pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage with global auction search, featured categories, and entry points to key flows.
primary_functions: Run a global keyword search across all livestock auctions using the main search bar.
Link into category-focused browsing such as feeder cattle, bulls, and cow-calf pairs.
Provide prominent links to search all auctions and view upcoming live auctions.
Provide entry points to selling (create listing), watchlist, saved searches, and user profile settings.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submitting the main search bar with a keyword (e.g., 'Angus heifer').
Clicking the 'Search all auctions' link on the homepage.
Clicking the 'Upcoming live auctions' section or link on the homepage.
Clicking a 'Sell Livestock' call-to-action block within the homepage content.
Completing registration as a buyer and proceeding to configure profile settings.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Home' link in the global header navigation.
Default landing page when visiting the site root URL.

pages.name: Auctions & Search Results
pages.description: Unified search and listings page for browsing, filtering, and sorting livestock auction lots.
primary_functions: Display auction lots based on keyword search, category, and other criteria.
Provide filters for location (state, city, ZIP + radius), category/class, breed, weight range, head count, price per head, price per pound, and closing/auction dates.
Offer sorting options such as price per head, price per pound, head count, distance, and closing soon.
Support special views like 'Search all auctions' and 'Upcoming live auctions' via pre-set filters.
Allow users to save the current search with a custom name and enable/disable in-site alerts.
Allow navigation to individual lot detail pages by clicking on lot cards.

incoming_params.description: Optional search keyword, e.g., 'Angus heifer'.
Category to filter lots by, e.g., 'feeder_cattle', 'bulls'. Used by header category links.
ID of a saved search whose criteria should be re-run via runSavedSearch.
Filter by state (e.g., 'Oklahoma', 'Texas').
Optional city-level location filter.
ZIP code for radius-based location search.
Radius around the given ZIP code in miles.
Minimum head count filter.
Maximum head count filter.
Minimum average or individual weight in pounds.
Maximum average or individual weight in pounds.
Price unit filter: 'per_head', 'per_pound', or 'per_pair'.
Minimum price filter based on priceUnit.
Maximum price filter based on priceUnit.
Closing date constraint type, e.g., 'ending_within_days' or 'date_range'.
Minimum days from now for closing date (e.g., 0 for today).
Maximum days from now for closing date (e.g., 3 for 'ending in next 3 days').
Auction format filter, e.g., 'online_timed' or 'live_auction'.
Lot status filter such as 'live' or 'scheduled'.
Current sort option (e.g., 'price_per_head_low_to_high').
Current page number for paginated results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Clicking on a lot card in the search results list/grid.
Clicking a 'View all saved searches' or 'Manage saved searches' link after saving a search.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'All Auctions', 'Feeder Cattle', 'Bulls', and 'Cow-Calf Pairs' links in the global header navigation.
Accessed when other pages link here with query parameters for keyword, category, savedSearchId, or filter presets.

pages.name: Lot Details
pages.description: Detailed page for a single auction lot, showing full information and buyer/seller actions.
primary_functions: Display complete lot information including title, breed, class, head count, weights, price format, current bids, reserve status, location, and closing date/time.
Show additional details such as animal age (for bulls), description, photos, and seller information.
Allow the user to add or remove the lot from their watchlist.
Allow the user to place a bid by entering a maximum bid (per head or per pound as applicable) and confirming the bid.
Allow the user to contact the seller by composing and sending a message related to the lot.
For the user's own draft or active listings, provide an 'Edit Listing' action that navigates to the Edit Listing page.

incoming_params.description: ID of the auction lot to display detailed information for.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Clicking the 'Edit Listing' button when viewing your own lot.
Clicking a 'View conversation in inbox' link after contacting the seller.

access_methods.description: Accessed when a user clicks a lot card anywhere on the site, passing lotId in the query string.

pages.name: Create Listing
pages.description: Form page for creating a new livestock auction listing.
primary_functions: Capture essential listing details such as title, category/class (e.g., bred cows, feeder cattle), breed, quantity/head count, and location (state and city).
Capture pricing details including starting bid (per head or per pound) and optional reserve price.
Allow setting of auction timing including closing date and closing time.
Provide a description field for animal details (age, breeding status, management notes) and optional media uploads.
Validate required fields and publish the new listing so it becomes an active or scheduled auction lot.

incoming_params.description: Optional category preselection when creating a listing from a specific category context.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Successfully submitting the 'Publish Listing' form.
Clicking a 'Back to My Listings' link or button on the create listing page.

access_methods.description: Primary access via the 'Sell Livestock' link in the global header navigation.
Accessed via 'Create Listing' calls-to-action placed in other page content (e.g., homepage hero).

pages.name: Edit Listing
pages.description: Form page for editing an existing draft or active auction listing.
primary_functions: Load and display existing listing information for review and modification.
Allow editing of key fields such as quantity/head count, starting bid, reserve price, closing date/time, and description.
Support updating draft listings (e.g., changing lot size and pricing) and saving changes without publishing.
Optionally support updating active listings where allowed by business rules (e.g., editing description).
Save all changes and return the user to the listing details or My Listings view.

incoming_params.description: ID of the listing being edited.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Clicking 'Save Changes' after editing a listing.
Clicking a 'Back to My Listings' link from the edit listing page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Edit Listing' links/buttons that pass a lotId query parameter.

pages.name: My Listings
pages.description: Dashboard for the user to view and manage all of their auction listings.
primary_functions: List the user's auction listings in a table or grid showing key information such as title, status (draft, scheduled, live, closed), bids, and closing date.
Provide a Status filter to show only certain listing types, such as drafts for editing workflows.
Allow the user to click any listing to open its lot details page.
Provide quick access actions such as creating a new listing and opening the edit screen for specific listings.

incoming_params.description: Optional status filter applied on load (e.g., 'draft' to show only draft listings).
Current sort option for listings, preserved across pagination/filter changes.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Clicking a listing row or card in the My Listings table/grid.
Clicking the 'Create New Listing' button.

access_methods.description: Accessible through the 'My Listings' link in the global header navigation.

pages.name: Watchlist
pages.description: Personalized page where the user can review and manage all lots they are watching.
primary_functions: Display a list of all lots the user has added to their watchlist with key data like price, category, location, and closing time.
Allow sorting and basic filtering of watchlisted lots (e.g., by closing soon, category, or price).
Allow the user to remove lots from the watchlist.
Provide links from each watchlisted lot to its detailed lot page.

incoming_params.description: Sort option for watchlist items, e.g., 'closing_soonest' or a price-based sort.
Optional category filter applied to the watchlist.
Optional maximum price filter for watchlisted lots.
Filter type for closing dates on watchlist items.
Minimum days from now for closing date filter on watchlist.
Maximum days from now for closing date filter on watchlist.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Clicking a watchlisted lot card to view its details.

access_methods.description: Accessible through the 'Watchlist' link in the global header navigation.

pages.name: Saved Searches
pages.description: Management page for saved searches and their in-site alert settings.
primary_functions: List all saved searches with their names, basic criteria summary, and alert status.
Allow the user to run a saved search again, navigating to the Auctions page with those filters applied.
Allow renaming or deleting saved searches.
Allow toggling in-site alerts on or off for each saved search.

incoming_params.description: Optional ID of a saved search to highlight after it has just been created.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Clicking the name of a saved search to run it again.

access_methods.description: Accessible through the 'Saved Searches' link in the global header navigation.

pages.name: Profile Settings
pages.description: Page for configuring user profile details, livestock interests, and visibility/contact preferences.
primary_functions: Allow editing of basic profile information such as full name, ranch/business name, and location (state and city).
Allow selection and modification of primary livestock interests (e.g., feeder cattle, bred heifers, stocker calves).
Allow the user to set a preferred contact method, such as in-site messages only.
Provide a toggle to show or hide buying interests on the user's profile.
Save all profile and preference changes for use across the site.

incoming_params.description: When true, indicates the user has just registered and is completing initial profile setup.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Clicking a 'Back to auctions' or 'Start browsing' link after saving profile settings.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Profile' link in the global header navigation.

pages.name: Messages
pages.description: Inbox-style page for viewing and responding to in-site messages.
primary_functions: Display a list of message conversations with other parties related to auction lots.
Allow the user to open a conversation and view the full message history.
Allow composing and sending replies within existing conversations.

incoming_params.description: Optional ID of a message thread to open immediately when the page loads.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Clicking the lot title within a message thread header to view the associated listing.

access_methods.description: Linked from a messages/inbox icon or entry within the user menu in the header.
Can be accessed directly via URL, optionally including a threadId parameter.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Informational page describing the livestock auction marketplace.
primary_functions: Explain the purpose of the website and the types of livestock auctions it supports.
Describe how buying, bidding, and selling work at a high level.
Highlight trust, safety, and any key platform advantages.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'About' link in the global footer navigation.

pages.name: Help & How It Works
pages.description: Help center and guidance on using the auction site effectively.
primary_functions: Provide step-by-step guidance for common actions such as searching, watching lots, bidding, and creating listings.
Answer frequently asked questions about bidding rules, reserve prices, payment timing, and auction closing behavior.
Offer troubleshooting tips for common user issues (e.g., filters not showing results).

incoming_params.description: Optional ID of a help section to scroll to (e.g., 'bidding', 'creating-listings').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Clicking a 'Contact support' link from within a help article.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Help & How It Works' link in the global footer navigation.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and form for reaching site support.
primary_functions: Display contact details such as support email, phone number, and support hours.
Provide a contact form for users to submit questions or feedback about auctions, listings, or account issues.

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected topic for the contact form, such as 'bidding' or 'account'.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Contact' link in the global footer navigation.

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the livestock auction website.
primary_functions: Present the terms and conditions for using the website and participating in auctions.
Specify user responsibilities, bidding rules, and limitations of liability.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Terms of Use' link in the global footer navigation.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Policy describing how user data and privacy are handled.
primary_functions: Explain what personal and usage data is collected and why.
Describe how data is stored, shared, and protected.
Outline user rights regarding their data and privacy preferences.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Privacy Policy' link in the global footer navigation.

header_links.description: Homepage with global search and featured auctions
Browse and search all livestock auctions
View and manage your auction listings
View lots you have added to your watchlist
View and manage saved auction searches
Edit your profile, interests, and visibility settings

footer_links.description: Legal terms for using the site
Information about data collection and privacy
